Text Box Layout
Alignment, writing mode, overflow, and wrapping
Centered in Box
center + middle
This is a longer text that should wrap and be justified in the box.
justify + lineHeight
竖排文字
vertical
Text line 1. Text line 2. Text line 3. Text line 4. Text line 5.
overflow=hidden
No wrap text
no wrap
Auto sized box
auto size (no TextBox)
